en_body:
morning comes
I
still love Life
hearing within early mist
the silken dawn

morning comes
leaves wave
their lovely hands
wind caresses green robes
the South
winter faraway

morning comes
waking from an ivory dream
who
was the dream-lover
through night
drunken with me

morning comes
loving
one lifetime too deeply
he sings the fragrant song
Love's grace
full and ebbing

morning comes
I
am
loved by you
hearing within the music
his Love
caressing.
